testcase.name: test_create_booking_and_list
testcase.error: backend/tests/backend_test.py:28: in auth assert r.status_code == 200, f"signup failed: {r.status_code} {r.text}" E AssertionError: signup failed: 400 {"detail":"Email already registered"} E assert 400 == 200 E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_wishlist_flow
testcase.error: backend/tests/backend_test.py:28: in auth assert r.status_code == 200, f"signup failed: {r.status_code} {r.text}" E AssertionError: signup failed: 400 {"detail":"Email already registered"} E assert 400 == 200 E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code
